w:r.w:t: Blooming Birthday Garden - Project Kit Blueprint
Version: Ultimate v6.0
Target: Claude Sonnet 5
Purpose: Premium floral birthday experience built from the existing Artifact v4 codebase.
Project Vision
Transform the graduation website into a handcrafted floral birthday experience while preserving engineering quality, responsiveness, performance, and maintainability.
Creative Direction
Theme: Blooming Birthday Garden. Mood: elegant, warm, floral, premium, calm, scrapbook-inspired. Remove all graduation, ocean, fish, bubbles, school references.
Story Flow

Gift Box → Bloom Animation → Hero → Birthday Letter → Music → Relationship Counter → Birthday Countdown → Reasons I Admire You → Timeline → Floral Gallery → Bouquet Wishes → Memory Map → Voice Note → Secret Garden → Birthday Cake → Ending.
Visual System
Palette: Cream, Ivory, Blush Pink, Dusty Rose, Sage Green, Champagne Gold, Warm White. Rounded corners, soft shadows, premium spacing, glassmorphism used sparingly.
Motion Bible
Gentle animations only. Fade, bloom, float, shimmer, scale. Avoid abrupt transitions. Every animation should support the emotional journey.
Engineering Rules
Analyze all existing files before editing. Preserve working logic. Do not remove features unless replacing with equal or better functionality. Use CSS variables. Centralize editable content.
Editable Content
Recipient, sender, birthday date, relationship date, birthday letter, timeline, gallery captions, flower wishes, quotes, WhatsApp info, music, footer.
Claude Workflow
1. Analyze entire project. 2. Build feature inventory. 3. Produce implementation plan. 4. Redesign visuals. 5. Preserve functionality. 6. Self-review. 7. Final QA.
QA Checklist
No graduation wording. No ocean theme. Responsive. Smooth animations. No dead JS. No duplicate CSS. No placeholder text. Production-ready.
Master Prompt for Claude Sonnet 5

Read the complete project before changing anything. Build a mental model of the HTML, CSS, JavaScript, assets, animations, interactions, and dependencies. Do not begin coding until you fully understand the project.

Your primary objective is to preserve engineering quality while transforming the graduation experience into a luxury floral birthday experience called 'Blooming Birthday Garden'. Remove every graduation and ocean reference. Keep all useful functionality, improve UI/UX, optimize performance, and centralize every editable string into a single configuration object.
Deliver production-ready code only. Perform a complete self-review before finishing and verify that all interactions, animations, responsiveness, and accessibility remain intact.
